content.query:
--create table using copy into


CREATE TABLE dedicated_sql_pool_copy_into
(
    airline_id VARCHAR(100),
    airline_name VARCHAR(100),
    country VARCHAR(100)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION=ROUND_ROBIN
)


--using copy into

COPY INTO dedicated_sql_pool_copy_into
(
    airline_id 2,
    airline_name 1,
    country 3
)
FROM 'https://saselflearningadls.dfs.core.windows.net/serverlessextds/data1/'
WITH
(
    FILE_TYPE='CSV',
    CREDENTIAL=(IDENTITY='Managed Identity'),
    FIRSTROW=2
    
)

SELECT * FROM dedicated_sql_pool_copy_into
